string.text: Reporting a stiff... It's %s out here in %s, from the %s. The guy already moved on to a better place.
Found %s's body here in %s. He was with the %s. Looks like it happened a while ago, mutants are already sniffing around.
Poor bastard... left dead %s here in %s, from the %s. The Zone doesn't forgive anyone, stay sharp.
Found a body here. It's %s, in %s. Used to run with the %s, but he's not running with anyone anymore.
%s is dead in %s. The %s lost one of theirs. No comment, just the facts.
Got a fresh corpse. The stiff is %s, fell in %s, was with the %s. Just letting you know.
Reporting that %s went to eternal rest in %s. Was with the %s. May the earth rest easy on him.
Body alert: %s in %s, former member of the %s. Loot fast if you want anything useful.
